productDisplayName: Nike Men's Celso City Thong Flip Flop
description: Featuring premium design details, the nike Celso City men's Thong is your warm-weather companion, offering you durable construction with long-lasting comfort.Upper Leather thong straps with hand-stitched details for durability and comfort Toe separator made of leather for maximum comfort Midsole Footbed in pentagon shape for maximum style Leather footbed with phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning and comfort Footbed stitched to midsole for added durability Outsole Textured rubber outsole for ample impact protection and maximum traction shoe careUse a leather brush to clean the dustApply a leather conditioner to enhance the shine
